creator: rnoland@2hip.net
text:
I will include this in the compiz-0.6.2 update coming to a ports
collection near you very soon.  It really isn't any more evil than any
of the other hacks I've been looking at to enable KDE support.  I need
to run it through a tinderbox and verify that KDELIBS is sufficient.  I
think it may need to require KDEBASE.

robert.
